description: An employee has violated the company's attendance policy. Their manager, in consultation with HR, needs to issue a formal written warning.

nodes.task_description: Review the employee's attendance record and prior warnings.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP confirms the employee has had multiple unexcused absences and a prior verbal warning.

nodes.task_description: Draft the formal written warning document, citing the specific policy violation and outlining expectations for improvement.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP drafts a clear and fact-based warning letter.

nodes.task_description: Coach the manager on how to deliver the warning and document the conversation in the employee's HR file.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP provides guidance to the manager and logs the delivered warning in the HRIS.
